App icons for iOS and Android
Both iOS and Google Play require a 1024 by 1024 master PNG — no transparency for
iOS App Store: 1024 by 1024, no alpha, square. Google Play: 1024 by 1024, 32-bit
If you export a single 1024 PNG from SVG you can downscale inside Xcode or Andro
Open Graph and social previews
Social platforms require a raster image with a specific aspect ratio. 1200 by 63
You cannot generate this directly from a square SVG — the aspect ratio mismatch
